shots.title: Temple courtyard Branch B same-depth far standoff keyframe
shots.story_beat: Fenshou and Shuangji face each other across a broad rain-soaked temple courtyard before combat begins.
shots.visual_goal: Create a wide keyframe with both characters small, far away, same depth layer, and clearly separated left and right.
shots.action_goal: Two-character confrontation staged with a large open wet-stone action space between them.
shots.camera_goal: Wide cinematic courtyard composition prioritizing spatial readability over portrait scale.
shots.notes: Branch B package based on V1.9.2 spatial blocking source. No Dreamina command executed.

space_layer: Wide courtyard view with both characters far from the camera.
Large empty wet stone ground remains in the center between the two characters.
Fenshou uses the left-side corridor and left-rear building zone.
Shuangji uses the inner-right plaza zone in front of the main hall.
character_blocking_layer: Fenshou is far-left, small in frame, feet planted on wet stone ground.
Shuangji is far-right, small in frame, feet planted on wet stone ground.
Both characters are on the same distant depth layer.
Left-right separation is explicit and the center remains open.
